name: Mastema, the most trustworthy angel
description:
It's Chadstema from SMT V: Vengeance! I've never played Strange Journey but he slew in Vengeance so I just had to make him a bot.

I kinda sorta made up some of the lore regarding how Da'at formed... basically it's the Vortex World from Nocturne and Demi-Fiend helped Lucifer kill YHWH, but died in the process. Spoilers in the bot defs! Do keep in mind that this might not be 100% accurate to the Shin Megami Tensei V canon, but if you have suggestions to improve it then let me know!
creator: wendigooner
